name: RatingRequest
description: SAP BRIM Convergent Charging rating request for real-time usage event processing

fields.name: serviceType
fields.description: Type of service being charged (e.g., DATA, VOICE, SMS)

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp when the usage event occurred

fields.name: destinationId
fields.description: Destination for routing-based pricing (e.g., phone number, zone)

fields.name: attributes
fields.description: Additional custom attributes for pricing model evaluation
